title: Earnings Call Transcript: Elastic Q3 2026 Earnings Beat Expectations
text: Elastic (ESTC) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript. The company reported strong results that exceeded analyst expectations across key metrics. Revenue Performance: Total revenue $450 million, up 18% YoY. Sales-led subscription revenue $376 million, up 21% YoY. Key Metrics: Current remaining performance obligations (CRPO) crossed $1 billion for the first time. Customers with $100k+ ACV grew to 1,660+. Large deals ($1M+ ACV) grew more than 30% year-over-year. AI Adoption Metrics: 3,000+ customers using Elastic for AI. 2,700+ customers on Elastic Cloud for vector database. 470+ $100k+ ACV customers using AI solutions. Management highlighted that AI customers are showing approximately 6% higher consumption growth than non-AI customers. Profitability: Non-GAAP operating margin reached 18.6%. Subscription gross margin of 82%. Free cash flow margin of 12%. Forward Guidance: Full-year FY2026 revenue guidance raised to $1.734-$1.736 billion. Sales-led subscription revenue guidance raised to $1.434-$1.436 billion. Non-GAAP operating margin guidance at 16.3%. Strategic Commentary: CEO emphasized the ability to bridge enterprise data to the LLM is translating into expanded AI adoption. Competitive wins in SIEM modernization and platform consolidation noted.
